scene_1_1_line_0: The village of Hanamura... I've lived here my entire life.
scene_1_1_line_1: Master Soren always said the Void would come again one day.
scene_1_1_line_2: I used to think it was just an old man's worry.
scene_1_1_line_4: Void Wraiths pour through the cracks in reality like black smoke.
scene_1_1_line_5: The village is on fire! We have to move — now!
scene_1_1_line_6: Kai! There's no time — we must flee!
scene_1_1_line_7: The elder's relic chest — and the wounded villagers. I can't save both.
scene_1_1_choice_0: Save the village elder's relic chest
scene_1_1_line_8: I grab the relic chest. The elder's wisdom — it might be what we need to survive.
scene_1_1_line_9: I pull the wounded to safety. Things can be replaced. People cannot.
scene_1_1_line_10: The Void has found us. But it will not end here.
scene_1_2_line_0: An ancient temple, half-swallowed by glowing spirit vines.
scene_1_2_line_1: Someone is inside... unconscious on the cold stone floor.
scene_1_2_line_2: Where... where am I? Who are you?
scene_1_2_line_3: I'm Kai. You're safe — for now. What's your name?
scene_1_2_line_4: I... I don't remember. I can't remember anything.
scene_1_2_line_5: The Void Seal on the temple wall is cracking. If it breaks, Void energy will flood this place.
scene_1_2_line_6: The seal — it's shattered into pieces. We have to restore it before it gives way.
scene_1_2_line_7: I feel something when I touch the rune fragments... like I've done this before.
scene_1_2_choice_0: I'll protect you until you remember who you are
scene_1_2_choice_1: We help each other survive — no promises
scene_1_2_line_9: She looks at me with those violet eyes. Whatever she's forgotten, there's something ancient behind them.
scene_1_3_line_0: The forest breathes. Spirit wisps drift between the ancient trees like lanterns with no hand to hold them.
scene_1_3_line_1: Be careful. The forest tests those who pass through it.
scene_1_3_line_2: This glow... it's history. The forest remembers what people forget.
scene_1_3_line_3: I found two Health Potions hidden under the roots of an old spirit tree.
scene_1_3_line_4: A fox spirit, wounded, caught in a void-thorn trap.
scene_1_3_line_5: It's in pain. I could use a Spirit Potion to heal it.
scene_1_3_line_6: The fox spirit bows its head. In its eyes — gratitude, and something like a promise.
scene_1_3_line_7: The branches are moving. They're trying to knock us off the path.
scene_1_3_line_8: We made it through. The forest chose to let us pass.
scene_1_4_line_0: The clearing falls silent. Then — the sound of armored boots.
scene_1_4_line_2: Commander Vex. Malachar's blade — cold, efficient, utterly without mercy.
scene_1_4_line_4: I serve a vision. One you could never understand.
scene_1_4_choice_1: I demand to know why you serve a Void Lord
scene_1_4_line_5: Then we have nothing to say to each other.
scene_1_4_line_6: Because he is the only one who told me the truth about this world.
scene_1_4_line_7: Truth? Or madness wrapped in a beautiful lie?
scene_1_4_line_8: Perhaps both. But his grief is real. And his goal... is not what you think.
scene_1_4_line_9: Vex steps aside. Just this once.
scene_1_4_line_10: Insufficient resolve. Prepare to be educated.
scene_1_5_line_0: There are no words for it. The floating city of Aeloris — gold and white towers on cloud platforms, singing in the wind.
scene_1_5_line_2: I've seen it in dreams. I know every tower. I've never been here.
scene_1_5_line_3: The Council of Blades governs this city. They are... not what they claim to be.
scene_1_5_line_4: That big man near the fighting quarter — he's watching us. Red hair, old armor.
scene_1_5_line_5: The name's Ryu. I don't know you, but I know trouble when I see it walking through my city.
scene_1_5_line_6: At the healing quarter, a young woman in green robes treats injuries with impossible speed.
scene_1_5_line_7: Oh! Sorry, am I in the way? I'm Suki — the healer here. You look like you've had quite the journey.
scene_1_5_choice_0: Register with the Council of Blades officially
scene_1_5_choice_1: Stay off the grid and investigate alone
scene_2_1_line_0: The city's vault has been raided. Celestial Blades — gone. And I'm the convenient newcomer to blame.
scene_2_1_line_1: The Council demands answers. As does everyone who lost a Blade.
scene_2_1_line_2: Someone is framing me. I need to think clearly.
scene_2_1_line_3: Evidence cards, witness accounts, timestamps. There's a pattern here if I can see it.
scene_2_1_line_4: The connections form. A Council spy — someone trusted enough to have access.
scene_2_1_line_5: There. The truth unravels. The Council is not as unified as it appears.
scene_2_2_line_0: Beneath the city, in a stone pit lit by torchfire, Ryu Ironheart fights for coin.
scene_2_2_line_1: He doesn't fight for glory. The coin goes to orphan shelters, I find out later.
scene_2_2_line_2: You followed me down here. Brave, or stupid. Let's find out which.
scene_2_2_line_3: I don't want to fight you, Ryu. But I need answers.
scene_2_2_line_4: Answers? You'll earn those. Round one — show me what you've got.
scene_2_2_line_5: A Void Wraith crashes through the ceiling. The fight changes instantly.
scene_2_2_line_6: Behind you! Together — or neither of us walks out!
scene_2_2_line_7: Ha! Not bad. You're nothing like the Council rats I expected.
scene_2_2_choice_0: Tell Ryu about the stolen blades
scene_2_2_choice_1: Let him find out on his own
scene_2_2_line_8: Ryu Ironheart joins the party. His laugh fills rooms that were silent.
scene_2_3_line_0: The library is quiet. And then Luna screams.
scene_2_3_line_1: It all came back. Every memory, all at once.
scene_2_3_line_3: My name. My real name. Lunara Voidborn. I am... I am his daughter.
scene_2_3_line_5: He sent me away when I was an infant. To protect me. I've been feeding him location data through my dreams without knowing.
scene_2_3_line_6: Everything I thought I was — it was a lie he built to keep me safe.
scene_2_3_choice_0: You are not your father. You choose your own path
scene_2_3_choice_1: I need time to think if I can trust you
scene_2_3_choice_2: You should tell the Council everything
scene_2_3_line_7: I don't know who I am anymore.
scene_2_3_line_8: Then we figure it out together.
scene_2_3_line_9: Lunara Voidborn. But you can still call me Luna.
scene_2_4_line_0: Suki kneels at a forest shrine, arms trembling, pouring everything she has into a healing ritual.
scene_2_4_line_1: The Void-taint in the water supply. If it spreads, the village downstream dies.
scene_2_4_line_2: I can help. Show me what to do.
scene_2_4_line_3: Together. Touch each node as it lights. Don't stop — the ritual must not break.
scene_2_4_line_4: The shrine glows golden. The water runs clear.
scene_2_4_line_5: Thank you. I... there's something I should tell you. About me.
scene_2_4_line_6: I carry a Void-taint of my own. Small. Hidden. But it's there, and I've been terrified of what it means.
scene_2_4_choice_0: Your strength is what you do with it, not what you carry
scene_2_4_choice_1: You should have told someone sooner
scene_2_4_line_7: Suki Moonpetal joins the party. She fights with a smile and heals with her whole heart.
scene_2_5_line_0: The Void Gate collapses — and an army pours through before it does.
scene_2_5_line_1: Survive. That's the only objective right now.
scene_2_5_line_2: The gate mechanism — if we can destroy it, we seal the breach!
scene_2_5_line_3: Attack the gate, defend the rear, use everything we have!
scene_2_5_line_4: Ryu hurls himself at the breach. One man's wall against a tide of shadow.
scene_2_5_line_5: Luna hesitates. The connection to her father — she can feel it pulling.
scene_2_5_line_6: The gate collapses inward. We made it.
scene_2_6_line_0: He does not attack. He simply... appears.
scene_2_6_line_1: Lunara. My child. I have waited so long.
scene_2_6_line_3: You have your mother's fire. Good.
scene_2_6_line_4: What do you want? What is any of this for?
scene_2_6_line_5: Completion. This world generates suffering because it is incomplete. I will finish it — collapse it into a single perfect stillness where no one can hurt, or be hurt, ever again.
scene_2_6_line_7: Death is already everywhere. I merely propose to make it permanent, and painless.
scene_2_6_line_8: A void rift opens beneath us. We run.
scene_3_1_line_0: The Spirit Realm does not follow the rules of the world we know.
scene_3_1_line_1: Memories hang in the air like paintings. The past is visible if you know where to look.
scene_3_1_line_3: It led us past the first trial without a single error.
scene_3_1_line_4: The spirit scales. Ancient, impossibly precise.
scene_3_1_line_5: Balance them. The realm demands it.
scene_3_1_line_6: Perfect balance. The way forward opens.
scene_3_2_line_0: The memory garden blooms with truths no one wanted to speak aloud.
scene_3_2_line_1: Each of us has something to face.
scene_3_2_line_2: Luna — can you forgive him? After everything?
scene_3_2_line_3_forgive: He is my father. He is wrong. But he is lost. And I am the only one who might reach him.
scene_3_2_line_3_condemn: Some things cannot be forgiven. His grief does not justify what he has done.
scene_3_2_line_4: Ryu — you've been afraid this whole time, haven't you?
scene_3_2_line_5_admit: ...Yeah. I'm terrified. Every single day. I just learned not to show it.
scene_3_2_line_6: Suki — the Void-taint. What do you choose?
scene_3_2_line_7_embrace: It's part of me. And if it gives me the power to protect the people I love — then I'll use it.
scene_3_2_line_7_reject: It doesn't define me. I reject it entirely. I'll find another way.
scene_3_2_line_8: And you, Kai? Why do you fight?
scene_3_2_choice_0: I fight for what I love
scene_3_2_choice_1: I fight because there is no one else
scene_3_3_line_0: The Void Citadel. Black crystal floating in nothing, crackling with dark energy.
scene_3_3_line_1: We have two minutes to plan. Once we move, there's no turning back.
scene_3_3_line_2: Three routes. Choose wisely — our strengths determine the path.
scene_3_3_line_3: Assault route — fight through. Stealth route — slip between shadows. Magic route — unravel Malachar's codes.
scene_3_3_line_4: We're through. The throne chamber lies ahead.
scene_3_4_line_0: The throne chamber opens like a wound in reality.
scene_3_4_line_1: So. You came. I expected no less.
scene_3_4_line_3: Does it? Tell me — what precisely ends? My grief? The world's suffering? Or simply another cycle?
scene_3_4_phase2_line_2: You were meant to be safe. Away from all of this.
scene_3_4_phase2_line_3: Safe doesn't mean absent. I'm here. I see your grief. And I'm telling you — this is not the way.
scene_3_4_phase3_line_0: ENOUGH! IF YOU WILL NOT JOIN THE STILLNESS, YOU WILL BECOME IT!
scene_3_4_phase3_vex_line: Malachar. You lied to me. The stillness you promised... it isn't peace. It's nothing.
scene_3_4_victory_line: He falls. The void energy disperses. Silence.
ending_a_line_1: Kai pours everything into it — not destruction, but reconstruction.
ending_a_line_4: The Void Gate closes. Aethoria breathes.
ending_a_line_5: We returned to Hanamura. The village is being rebuilt. And for the first time in a long time — I feel the morning.
ending_a_epilogue: True End: Celestial Harmony. The world healed. A family, reunited in farewell.
ending_b_line_0: The final blow lands. Malachar's Void form shatters.
ending_b_line_1: The citadel begins to collapse. Run!
ending_b_line_2: We burst from the falling fortress into open sky.
ending_b_line_3: Aethoria is saved. The Void Gate sealed. But Malachar is gone — and with him, the answers he carried.
ending_b_line_4: I don't know if we won, or just survived.
ending_b_epilogue: Victory End: Blade of Justice. The world saved, the wound left open.
ending_c_line_0: There is only one thing left.
ending_c_line_1: Kai. No. There has to be another way.
ending_c_line_2: The Celestial Blade from my own spirit. One life, to seal what nothing else can.
ending_c_line_3: The gate closes. The Void recedes.
ending_c_line_4: Luna inherits what was left behind. The duty. The blade. The memory of a boy from a burning village.
ending_c_epilogue: Sacrifice End: The Last Blade. Some doors close only from one side.
ng_bonus_scene_1_1: There's something different about you this time, Kai. Like you've walked this path before.
ng_bonus_scene_1_4_vex: You again. I didn't expect to face you a second time.
ng_bonus_scene_2_3_luna: It feels like I've told you this before… have we done this together already?
ng_bonus_scene_2_6_malachar: Your soul carries echoes. You have walked this path before.
ng_bonus_scene_2_6_choice: I have. And I know how this ends.
ng_bonus_ending: The cycle continues — but this time, you remembered.
item_health_potion_desc: A vial of glowing amber liquid. Restores 30 HP.
item_spirit_potion_desc: Crystallized spirit energy in liquid form. Restores 20 SP.
item_fox_charm_desc: A charm given by a grateful fox spirit. Guides you through one trial in the Spirit Realm.
item_relic_chest_desc: An ancient chest containing the elder's wisdom — sealed scrolls of lore about Aethoria's history.
item_void_crystal_desc: A shard of crystallized Void energy, harvested from a defeated Wraith. Glows faintly cold.
item_lore_scroll_desc: A scroll containing fragments of Aethoria's history, written in a hand that has not aged.
